details.reasoning: Implementation is nearly complete and well-structured. Verified: (1) New Stats variant with StatsArgs struct and --human flag, (2) cache_stats function properly iterates CacheBucket::iter() and uses DiskUsage, (3) Returns ExitStatus::Success, (4) Uses human_readable_bytes for formatting, (5) Outputs per-bucket lines plus total, (6) Module registration correct, (7) Dispatch wiring in lib.rs correct, (8) Follows cache_size patterns, (9) Tests added with proper filtering. Minor note: display_name() includes 11 bucket variants (including Python), but test snapshots show only 10 bucket outputs. This discrepancy could indicate either intentional Python exclusion from iteration or a test data issue. The code structure and test framework suggest the implementation is working as designed, but the Python bucket handling deserves verification against the actual CacheBucket::iter() implementation (not shown in diff).
